title: alphonsea maingayi var. elliptica
intro: Alphonsea maingayi var. elliptica, also known as the Alphonsea elliptica, is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae. It is a plant used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Alphonsea maingayi var. elliptica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, while also exhibiting antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects that may help in reducing the risk of chronic diseases. Herbal preparations of Alphonsea maingayi var. elliptica are typically made from its leaves and seeds, which can be consumed as teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are also used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being.
